name: Koda Ltd
summary: Koda Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, and sells wood furniture and fixtures in the Asia-Pacific, North America, Europe, and internationally. It operates through two segments, Manufacturing, and Retail and Distribution. The company manufactures wooden and steel furniture; and trades in, exports, and retails furniture. It offers bedroom, dining, living, and other collections of furniture products. The company is also involved in the inlaying of marble on wood; and interior decoration activities. In addition, it operates as a timber merchant. Koda Ltd was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Singapore.
